roles: party to the Master Services Agreement
responsibilities: Pay total fee of INR 48,00,000 in three milestones
Pay Milestone 1 (INR 16,00,000) on signing of SOW-01
Pay Milestone 2 (INR 16,00,000) on completion of Platform Build Deliverable
Pay Milestone 3 (INR 16,00,000) on UAT Sign-Off
Pay invoices within 30 days of receipt
Bear all applicable taxes
Shall not reverse engineer or sublicense the Vendor's Background IP except as permitted by law
Provide agreed test plan (Appendix A)
Conduct user acceptance testing
Approve reconciliation report demonstrating 100% record parity
Grant UAT Sign-Off for platform acceptance
providing timely access to the legacy system
nominating UAT participants
providing test data
Confirm the final data schema by 25 August 2025
review submitted deliverables within 10 business days
provide written notice of non-conformities if applicable
powers: wishes to procure the design, development, and deployment of a customer onboarding platform
engages the Vendor to provide services
executes SOWs
Authorize payments through Head of Procurement and Chief Financial Officer
Receives non-exclusive licence to use Vendor's Background IP for use of the Deliverables
terminate any SOW for convenience on 60 days' written notice
Requires a customer onboarding platform to replace existing manual onboarding process
Accept or reject Platform Build based on test plan compliance and UAT results
Approve data migration reconciliation report through Data Lead
Determine platform acceptance
accept deliverables
reject deliverables by providing written notice of non-conformities
deem deliverables accepted by not responding within review period
pre-approve expenses in writing
prior written consent required for reassignment of key personnel (consent not to be unreasonably withheld)
wishes to accelerate go-live
wishes to add a third-party CRM integration to the scope
acceptance of CRM Integration deliverable based on integration test passing

responsibilities: provide design, development, and deployment services for a customer onboarding platform
provide items, materials, software, and outputs (Deliverables) as specified in a SOW
perform the Services with reasonable skill and care
perform Services in accordance with good industry practice
Provide a written impact assessment (cost, schedule, and risk) for any proposed change on request before a Change Order is executed
Grants Client a non-exclusive licence to use Vendor's Background IP
perform Services in a professional and workmanlike manner
ensure Deliverables materially conform to specifications in the relevant SOW
maintain warranty for 90 days following acceptance
provide Services
design, build, and testing of the Platform Build Deliverable
Performance Tuning
submit deliverables
remedy notified non-conformities within 10 business days
resubmit remedied deliverables for review
shall not reassign key personnel without the Client's prior written consent
powers: represents expertise, personnel, and capacity to provide such services
provide services described in SOWs
Grants non-exclusive licence to Client to use Vendor's Background IP solely to the extent necessary for Client to use the Deliverables
disclaim all warranties except as expressly stated, to the extent permitted by law

responsibilities: execute SOWs describing specific Services, Deliverables, timelines, and fees
execute Change Orders in writing to amend an SOW or the Agreement
must provide written consent for assignment
must sign variations in writing
powers: amend SOW or Agreement through Change Order
may assign Agreement with other party's prior written consent
may vary Agreement terms in writing
sign the Change Order to make it effective and binding

roles: single point of contact for delivery

powers: Authorize payment for Milestone 1
Authorize payment for Milestone 3
Request a change to the scope, Deliverables, or timeline of an SOW
Sign a Change Order to make a change binding
Retains all right, title, and interest in its Background IP
terminate this Agreement or any SOW for material breach not cured within 30 days of written notice

responsibilities: Keep the other's Confidential Information secret during the term and for two years after termination
Use Confidential Information only for the purposes of this Agreement
comply with applicable laws in performing this Agreement
Approve reconciliation report demonstrating 100% record parity
powers: Approve or reject data migration based on reconciliation report

data.detail: The onboarding web application, comprising the customer registration workflow, document upload, and an administrative console.
Migration of existing customer records from the Client's legacy system into the new platform, including data cleansing and validation.
Optimisation of platform response times prior to go-live.
Formal Client acceptance of the platform following user acceptance testing.
30 days of post go-live support, including defect triage and resolution, commencing on the go-live date.
A real-time integration between the onboarding platform and the Client's Salesforce CRM, including field mapping and error handling. Added via Change Order to SOW-01.
